allow: PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object {$_.Id -eq 5540} | Select-Object Name, Path, Description)

PowerShell($proc = Get-WmiObject Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId = 5540"; if \($proc\) { "$\($proc.Name\) | $\($proc.ExecutablePath\) | $\($proc.CommandLine\)" } else { "Process not found" }; tasklist /FI "PID eq 5540" 2>&1)
PowerShell(Get-Service | Where-Object {$_.Name -match "pg" -or $_.Name -match "sql"} | Select-Object Name, DisplayName, Status)
PowerShell(Start-Process powershell -Verb RunAs -ArgumentList "-Command `"Restart-Service postgresql-x64-18; exit`"" -Wait 2>&1; Start-Sleep 3; \(Get-Service postgresql-x64-18\).Status)
PowerShell($env:PGPASSWORD = ""; & "C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL\\18\\bin\\psql.exe" -U postgres -h 127.0.0.1 -p 5432 -c "ALTER USER postgres WITH PASSWORD 'postgres';" 2>&1)

PowerShell(Copy-Item "C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL\\18\\data\\pg_hba.conf.bak" "C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL\\18\\data\\pg_hba.conf" -Force; Start-Process powershell -Verb RunAs -ArgumentList "-Command `"Restart-Service postgresql-x64-18; exit`"" -Wait; Start-Sleep 3; $env:PGPASSWORD = "postgres"; & "C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL\\18\\bin\\psql.exe" -U postgres -h 127.0.0.1 -p 5432 -c "SELECT version\(\);" 2>&1)

PowerShell($env:PATH = "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs;" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","User"\); Set-Location "C:\\Users\\LENOVO\\Desktop\\Akadem\\backend"; $job = Start-Job -ScriptBlock { $env:PATH = "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs;$env:PATH"; Set-Location "C:\\Users\\LENOVO\\Desktop\\Akadem\\backend"; npm run dev 2>&1 }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; Receive-Job $job; Stop-Job $job; Remove-Job $job)
